S.FORM: I 1965 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Adama Barrow , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Gambia anini i ci Adama Barrow, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 19 a romi'ad. Kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô

S.FORM: I 1965 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Adama Barrow , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Gambia anini i ci Adama Barrow, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 19 a romi'ad. Kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
